chunks.title: Instructions on Conquering Nations
chunks.reason: Establishes the command to destroy seven nations and avoid intermarriage.

chunks.title: Reason for God's Choice
chunks.reason: Explains that Israel was chosen due to God's love and covenant rather than size.

chunks.title: Promises of Blessing for Obedience
chunks.reason: Details the rewards of keeping God's judgments including prosperity and health.

chunks.title: Encouragement to Trust in Battle
chunks.reason: Addresses potential fear of numerous enemies and commands total destruction of idols.
